mapper.select: SELECT * FROM form_submit_value WHERE value_id = #{valueId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT t1.item_id, t1.item_name, t1.item_type, t1.default_value, t2.value_text, t2.user_id FROM form_item t1 LEFT JOIN form_submit_value t2 ON t2.item_id = t1.item_id AND t2.submit_id = #{submitId} AND t2.deleted = 0 WHERE t1.form_id = #{formId} AND t1.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t1.sort, t1.item_id

SELECT t.user_id, t.show_name, t.user_name, t1.submit_id, t2.item_id, t2.item_name, t2.item_type, t1.value_text FROM user t0 LEFT JOIN form_submit t3 ON t3.user_id = t0.user_id AND t3.form_id = #{formId} AND t3.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN form_submit_value t1 ON t1.submit_id = t3.submit_id AND t1.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN form_item t2 ON t2.item_id = t1.item_id AND t2.deleted = 0 WHERE t2.item_name IS NOT NULL AND t0.deleted = 0 AND t0.user_id = #{userId} AND t0.user_name = #{userName} AND t0.show_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{showName}, '%') ORDER BY t1.user_id, t1.value_id

SELECT t1.item_id, t0.item_name, t1.value_text, COUNT(*) as count FROM form_item t0 LEFT JOIN form_submit_value t1 ON t1.item_id = t0.item_id AND t1.deleted = 0 WHERE t0.item_type = 'select' AND t0.deleted = 0 GROUP BY t0.item_id, t0.item_name, t1.value_text
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_submit_value (item_id, form_id, value_text, user_id, submit_id) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{formId}, #{valueText}, #{userId}, #{submitId})
mapper.update: UPDATE form_submit_value SET deleted = 1 WHERE value_id = #{valueId}
